Off Calendar Feb-16-2005 Continued To Apr-08-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Feb-15-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Judge Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Anthony Vaughn.
Ryan Krohn, Esq. for Plaintiff: Aveda Services, Inc., a corporation.
Order waiving appearance of witness is in file.
After hearing the evidence presented and declaration in support, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendants: Zendo, Inc., a corporation dba Zendo Urban retreat; Zendo Urban Retreat, a partnership; Barbara Nelson and Kristin Nelson ind. and dba Zendo Urban Retreat as follows:
Damages $128,252.53
Prejudgment Interest $10,225.74
Attorney's fees $660.00
Bounced Check Damages $4,500.00
Costs $433.80 for a total of $144,072.07
Judgment signed in open court.

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Feb-03-2005 Continued To Feb-15-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218
